dealSummary: Advanced satellite builder Astranis secured a $300 million Series E led by Snowpoint Ventures and Franklin Templeton alongside a credit facility of up to $155 million from Trinity Capital.
leadInvestors: Snowpoint Ventures, Franklin Templeton alongside a credit facility of up to $155 million from Trinity Capital

dealSummary: Finnish satellite startup Iceye is in talks to raise a €250 million round that could value the startup at around €5 billion, Bloomberg reported.
Dutch industrial quantum processor developer QuantWare received a $178 million Series B from investors including Intel Capital, IQT and ETF Partners.
Enter, a Brazil-based legal AI startup, raised a $100 million Series B led by Founders Fund at a $1.2 billion valuation.
Cytospire Therapeutics, a London biotech developing multispecific immune cell engager antibodies, secured a £61 million Series A led by 4BIO Capital.
Tessera Labs, the developer of enterprise automation tools, received a $60 million Series A led by Andreessen Horowitz.
Kanvas Biosciences, which focuses on microbiome mapping and therapeutics, raised a $48 million Series A led by DCVC and Lions Capital.
Canadian EV battery repurposing specialist Moment Energy secured a $40 million Series B led by Evok Innovations.
Cybersecurity startup XBOW received a $35 million Series C extension from investors including Accenture Ventures, DNX Ventures and Liberty Global Tech Ventures.
leadInvestors: Accenture Ventures, DNX Ventures, Liberty Global Tech Ventures

dealSummary: Copilotkit, the developer of a platform connecting AI agents with user interfaces, raised a $27 million Series A led by Glilot Capital, NFX and SignalFire.
Helsinki-based quantum AI startup Qutwo secured €25 million at a €325 million valuation from angel investors.
